programme.title: S1E1 Lucha
programme.desc: Ian Hodgkinson, known as Vampiro in the world of wrestling, was a famed wrestler in the late 80’s and 90’s. Today, he shifted his career to being behind the scenes as a Story Producer for AAA, the top wrestling company in Lucha Libre. Hodgkinson intimately peels back the curtain on the mysteries of this show, how it’s produced, and what life is like on and off the stage. We dive deep in to the lives of two wrestlers and follow their stories as they prep for their next fight: El Hijo Del Fantasma, an up and coming star who seemingly has it all, as well as Faby Apache, a veteran female wrestler struggling to stay relevant as she raises her son.

programme.title: Mclintock! 1963

As wealthy cattle baron George Washington McLintock tries to keep the peace between feuding homesteaders, rowdy cowhands, and local Native tribes, he also faces his toughest battle yet—his fiery estranged wife (Maureen O’Hara), who’s just returned to town. Filled with slapstick brawls, lively banter, and heartwarming humor, McLintock! delivers classic Western entertainment with larger-than-life charm.

programme.desc: Keefer has a talent. He can eat...A LOT. But it’s not until after getting fired from his job, finding his girl getting railed by a tranny and almost getting arrested for drug trafficking, that Keefer decides (with the help of his best friend Meegosh) to start an underground food eating competition. After the health crazed Mayor Fingstal and his cronies Officers Slivjack and Biggsley catch wind of it, all hell breaks loose. Then it all comes down to one final food battle from hell, THE NACHO MOUNTAIN! Set to a killer Stoner Rock soundtrack with loads of babes and crazy characters in the vein of Porky's and Meatballs, Nacho Mountain is sure to please those who have gotten beaten down, only to eat their way to the top!

programme.title: World Mysteries - Pearl Harbor: Surprise Attack or Anticipated Event?

programme.title: Forbidden Science - Clone Fantasy
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Huckberry's flagship adventure series is back in Japan and the DIRT crew is hungry as ever for adventure. This time, they’re diving into the Kansai region—where millennia-old traditions flow from the shore of Lake Biwa to surf breaks on the coast. Chef Coleman Griffin gives them a taste of the deep cultural immersion that inspires his culinary practice, from chef knives descended from samurai swords to fermented carp that went on to spawn sushi. And turns out, the perfect meal does exist, and the crew knew it as soon as they had a bite of their final omakase.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep107
programme.desc: Liquid Edge highlights the kiteboarding doc With A Kite; profiles one of surfing’s greatest legends, Tom Carroll; checks out the O’Neill Coldwater Classic in Canada; and unveils Sligo, Ireland…an extreme surf sweet spot. Also featured is female big wave surfer, Maya Gabriel; an inside look at Pipeline from The Essence of Surfing; and wakeboarding innovator Dean Lavelle gives us his view on wakeboarding today.

programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef
programme.desc: This expedition to the Great Barrier Reef is designed to study the health and resilience of one of the world’s most amazing coral reefs. The expedition’s goal is to collect data about the world's most remote reefs and build a picture of how reefs are faring in today's changing climate.

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Minisodes - Canyoning, Jet Ski Free Ride, and Feeding Stingrays
programme.desc: The Deap Canyoning Team defies logic as they leap from high cliffs into deep canyon pools. This realatively new extreme sport called Canyoning, is breathtaking and spectacular viewing!

programme.title: Xplash Ep107
programme.desc: Xplash brings you spectacular water-related action from around the globe. Today we'll catch some big-air freestyle kitesurfing in the Canary Islands, bodysurf giant waves in Ireland, go whitewater kayaking in Iceland and check out Hydro Flight at the Poseidon Games in Australia.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The path to mission readiness takes a sharp turn as contestants are introduced to the Cupolster—an innovative holster system that changes the game when seconds matter. Don delivers a critical safety lesson before the team puts the gear to the test, running a demanding course of fire from inside a truck. From standard draws to Cupolster drills, every move is about speed, precision, and survival under pressure. The action escalates with a SAR9 passenger-seat course of fire that leaves contestants breathless —proving that combat can come from anywhere, at any time. But the real trial begins when Ken Shamrock unleashes his legendary Iron Man challenge. In three-minute elimination rounds, contestants go toe-to-toe against each other, testing not only strength but everything they’ve absorbed under Shamrock’s punishing guidance. It’s survival of the fittest—where only the toughest, sharpest, and most disciplined will walk away victorious.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Ken Shamrock’s Iron Man competition comes to a head as two contestants battle it out for the number one spot. Every strike, every takedown matters—because only one can walk away crowned the victor. But there’s no time to celebrate. It’s mission day. After a quick live-fire break, the team receives critical intel from the ISR daylight crew. The risk spikes as night falls and the mission is suddenly altered, forcing the contestants to adapt on the fly. With Red Cat providing coordination from above, the squad is redeployed under new marching orders and even higher stakes. A partially compromised team makes survival uncertain, but when the moment of truth arrives, the team leader takes decisive action—leading a direct breach on the target. One bold decision shifts the course of the mission entirely, and its success now hangs by a thread.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Laura is back with Will Harris and family on their legendary farm. This week, we take a step further to unraveling the philosophies that make Will one of the true innovators of our time. Laura also gets to see how the “Poorest town in America” has been impacted for the better due to Whit Oak Pastures and their commitment to the community they serve. Later, Laura and Will get gussied up to attend a gala that recognizes Will for his dedication.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Laura’s search for farm heroes leads her to White Cloud, Kansas to meet with Ray Archuleta who is inspiring an entire generation of agricultural trailblazers. In order to prove how vital soil health is to farming, Ray and Laura get their hands dirty in the fields to collect samples. With three samples in tow, its back to the lab they go to try out Ray’s rain simulator. How will the farm samples stack up? Let’s find out.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: In this episode, the contestants are off and running, putting what they've learned so far into practice and reaping the rewards. Now it's your turn! Learn what these pros have been learning and how you can use it to improve the value of your home and the safety and happiness of your life.

programme.title: S1E1 Lucha
programme.desc: Ian Hodgkinson, known as Vampiro in the world of wrestling, was a famed wrestler in the late 80’s and 90’s. Today, he shifted his career to being behind the scenes as a Story Producer for AAA, the top wrestling company in Lucha Libre. Hodgkinson intimately peels back the curtain on the mysteries of this show, how it’s produced, and what life is like on and off the stage. We dive deep in to the lives of two wrestlers and follow their stories as they prep for their next fight: El Hijo Del Fantasma, an up and coming star who seemingly has it all, as well as Faby Apache, a veteran female wrestler struggling to stay relevant as she raises her son.

programme.title: What's in the Barn
programme.desc: Matt is out for revenge. Last year Dale beat him badly at the Annual Vintage bike race in Barber, Alabama. But this year there is a whole new tale to tell. With just days until the race - Dale is secretly struggling to get the bike he beat Matt with last year up and working. Matt struggles just to locate a 100-year old bike. Matt's prayers are answered thanks to an old Catholic Priest he located who has possession of a bike. The priest might let Matt have the bike to race - but there are conditions. The toughest one: Don't tell Dale you have it. Can Matt afford to buy the bike and get it running in time for the race without Dale seeing it? Will Dale even get his broken bike started? And if they ever get to race, will Matt exact his revenge?

programme.title: Charleston
programme.desc: Jefferson Graham of Photowalks takes you to one of the richest and most populous colonies in the pre-Revolutionary War era: Charleston, South Carolina. Explore Charleston's layered history and scenic waterfront, along with its picturesque cobblestone streets.

programme.title: Newschannel 3 at 6pm
programme.desc: The NewsChannel 3 Evening News Team offers a report on the latest local, regional, statewide and national news events of the day, as well as detailed and timely updates on sports events, local weather conditions and rush-hour traffic issues.

programme.title: CBS Local 2 News at 6:30pm
programme.desc: The veteran CBS Local 2 News Team presents the latest headline news from around the community, along with current and coming weather conditions, up-to-the-minute traffic report, sports highlights and much more for area viewers.

programme.title: CBS Local 2 News at 10:00PM
programme.desc: The CBS 4 Nightly News Team presents a report on the major news events of the day and the details of late breaking news stories along with the latest sports updates, Palm Springs area weather conditions and the weather forecast for tomorrow.

programme.title: Newschannel 3 at 11pm
